screen_summary: The screen displays the 'Ghost Mode' interface of KiroOS, an AI Operating System Layer, showing controls for monitoring and a log of detected activities and errors.

detected_buttons.label: Scan Screen Now
detected_buttons.action_hint: Initiates an immediate scan of the screen for issues.

detected_buttons.action_hint: Indicates Ghost Mode is currently off.

detected_options.action_hint: Turns Ghost Mode on or off.
